diarized_transcript:
[Agent] Thank you for calling Genshin Impact Player Support. How can I help you today?
[Caller] Hi, I'm new — what's the difference between the Standard Banner and the Event Banner?
[Agent] Great question. The Standard Banner, also called the Permanent Wish, uses Acquaint Fates. Its 5-star pool is fixed and doesn't change over time — it includes a rotating set of standard 5-star characters and weapons. The Character Event Banner rotates every few weeks and features a specific 5-star character with a boosted chance. It uses Intertwined Fates.
[Caller] And the weapon banner?
[Agent] The Weapon Event Banner, called Epitome Invocation, also uses Intertwined Fates. It features two rate-up 5-star weapons, and the pity is 80 pulls instead of 90. The rules around choosing which weapon you get involve the Epitomized Path system, which is more complex than the character banner.
[Caller] So should I save my Intertwined Fates for the character banner?
[Agent] That depends on your priorities, but most players prioritize the Character Event Banner because the 50/50 rules are more forgiving and the characters tend to drive team composition. But it's really a personal preference.
[Caller] Makes sense. Thanks for explaining!
[Agent] My pleasure. Anything else?
[Caller] Nope, all good.
[Agent] Enjoy your wishes!
